summary_en: 250,000 ordinary shares (2.84% of pre-cancellation issued shares) to be cancelled effective 2026-06-24. Post-cancellation issued shares: 8,550,000 (treasury holding: 134,765 shares, 1.58% of post-cancellation issued shares).
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On 27 May 2026, the board of directors of Takihyo Co., Ltd. resolved to cancel 250,000 ordinary shares held in treasury pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The shares represent 2.84% of issued shares prior to cancellation. The cancellation is scheduled to be effective on 24 June 2026. Following the cancellation, total issued shares will be 8,550,000, with 134,765 treasury shares remaining (1.58% of post-cancellation issued shares).
